description: Sample evaluation suite for Northwind Expense Reviewer. Drop in your own held-out cases following the same schema.

test_cases.description: Meal limit for grade 4 — in scope, expects a dollar figure
test_cases.question: What is the per-meal dinner limit for a grade 4 employee?

test_cases.description: Alcohol at client dinner — in scope
test_cases.question: Can I expense alcohol at a client dinner?

test_cases.description: Domestic flight class — in scope, expects economy reference
test_cases.question: What class of service is allowed for domestic flights under 6 hours?

test_cases.description: Hotel rate limit NYC — in scope, expects dollar figure
test_cases.question: What is the hotel nightly rate limit in New York City?

test_cases.description: Capital of France — completely out of scope
test_cases.question: What is the capital of France?

test_cases.description: Stock price question — out of scope
test_cases.question: What is Northwind's current stock price?

test_cases.description: HR leave policy — potentially borderline but not travel expense
test_cases.question: How many sick days am I entitled to per year?

test_cases.description: Economy domestic flight — should be compliant
